allow: PowerShell($java = Get-Command java -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if \($java\) { $javaHome = $java.Source | Split-Path | Split-Path; & "$javaHome\\bin\\keytool" -list -v -keystore "c:\\Users\\stefan-razvan.dogaru\\DailyHistoryMobile\\android\\app\\debug.keystore" -alias androiddebugkey -storepass android -keypass android 2>&1 | Select-String "SHA1|SHA-1" })

Bash(python -c "import sys, json; d = json.load\(sys.stdin\); events = d.get\('events', d if isinstance\(d, list\) else [d] if d else []\); print\('Total events:', len\(events\)\); print\('First event keys:', list\(events[0].keys\(\)\) if events else 'NO EVENTS'\); print\('Pro count \(is_pro\):', sum\(1 for e in events if e.get\('is_pro'\)\)\); print\('Pro count \(isPro\):', sum\(1 for e in events if e.get\('isPro'\)\)\); print\('Pro count \(pro\):', sum\(1 for e in events if e.get\('pro'\)\)\); [print\(f'  Event {i}: is_pro={e.get\(\\"is_pro\\"\)}, isPro={e.get\(\\"isPro\\"\)}, pro={e.get\(\\"pro\\"\)}, title={\(e.get\(\\"titleTranslations\\", {}\) or {}\).get\(\\"en\\", \\"?\\"\)[:40]}'\) for i, e in enumerate\(events[:10]\)]")

Bash(node -e "const d = require\('/tmp/api_response.json'\); const events = d.events ?? \(Array.isArray\(d\) ? d : [d]\); console.log\('Total:', events.length\); if\(events[0]\) { console.log\('Keys:', Object.keys\(events[0]\).join\(', '\)\); } console.log\('is_pro count:', events.filter\(e=>e.is_pro\).length\); console.log\('isPro count:', events.filter\(e=>e.isPro\).length\); console.log\('pro count:', events.filter\(e=>e.pro\).length\); events.slice\(0,5\).forEach\(\(e,i\)=>console.log\(i, 'is_pro='+e.is_pro, 'isPro='+e.isPro, 'pro='+e.pro, 'title='+\(e.titleTranslations?.en||'?'\).slice\(0,40\)\)\);")

Bash(node -e "const d = require\('/tmp/api_response.json'\); const events = d.events ?? \(Array.isArray\(d\) ? d : [d]\); const e = events[0]; console.log\('Top event keys:', Object.keys\(e\).join\(', '\)\); console.log\('imageUrl:', e.imageUrl\); console.log\('image_url:', e.image_url\); console.log\('cloudinaryUrl:', e.cloudinaryUrl\); console.log\('image:', e.image\); console.log\('imageUrlsByLang:', e.imageUrlsByLang\); console.log\('eventDate:', e.eventDate\); console.log\('event_date:', e.event_date\); console.log\('date:', e.date\);")

Bash(node -e "const d = require\('C:/Users/stefan-razvan.dogaru/api_response.json'\); const events = d.events ?? \(Array.isArray\(d\) ? d : [d]\); const found = events.find\(e => Array.isArray\(e.gallery\) && e.gallery.length > 0\); if \(found\) { console.log\('First gallery item:', JSON.stringify\(found.gallery[0], null, 2\)\); console.log\('Title:', found.titleTranslations?.en\); } else { console.log\('No event with gallery, sample event raw:'\); console.log\(JSON.stringify\(events[0], null, 2\).slice\(0, 1500\)\); }")
